narrative.narrative: Fear has gripped the market as the Fear & Greed Index plunges to 25, mirroring the extreme capitulation seen during the August 2024 bottom formation. The surge in stablecoin growth amid this panic suggests smart money is quietly building dry powder, a pattern that preceded the sharp relief rally from those prior lows. The echoes of that August trough are growing louder, hinting that the current despair may be sowing the seeds for the next upward impulse.
narrative.headline: Extreme Fear Mirrors August's Capitulation Bottom

consensus.key_reasoning: The live score of 25 anchors the phase at Anxiety (24-31), and while the 79.1% pattern match to the August 2024 bottom is compelling, the hard rule prevents jumping rungs to Capitulation. The analyst's RISK_OFF read and divergent factors (ETF flows, funding, MVRV) warrant caution, but the strong bottom analog and stablecoin growth argue against a bearish SHORT signal, making CAUTION the correct stance as the setup develops.
disagreements_noted: Analyst calls Anxiety while Narrative Writer frames as Capitulation — a two-rung gap that violates the ±1 rule
Analyst emphasizes divergent factors (ETF flows, funding, MVRV) as cautionary while Narrative Writer focuses on the bullish accumulation analog
Analyst confidence 0.62 vs Narrative Writer 0.79 — moderate disagreement on conviction level
